title.purpose: Dialog titles and rare high-priority headings.

body.purpose: Menus, dialog copy, status text, and explanations.

label.purpose: Fields, buttons, tabs, and compact panel controls.

micro.purpose: Units, shortcuts, metadata, and grouping labels.

data.purpose: Coordinates, dimensions, percentages, and HUD values.

shadows.name: mechanical-low
shadows.purpose: Small controls when tonal separation is insufficient.

shadows.name: canvas-depth
shadows.purpose: The document plane above the canvas well.

motion.name: surface-exit
motion.purpose: Optional dismissal transition for temporary surfaces.

components.name: Primary Action
components.description: The single decisive action in a local workflow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { height: 28px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.74 0.15 55); border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(0.74 0.15 55); color: oklch(0.19 0 0); font: 600 11px/1 Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1), border-color 120ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.78 0.15 55); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.68 0.15 55); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.84 0.1 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Action
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { height: 28px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.34 0 0); border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(0.265 0 0); color: oklch(0.84 0 0); font: 500 11px/1 Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 120ms cubic-bezier(.25,1,.5,1); } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.31 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { background: oklch(0.24 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.74 0.15 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Compact Numeric Field
components.description: Dense editable value with an internal unit label.
components.css: .ds-field { box-sizing: border-box; display: inline-flex; height: 24px; min-width: 112px; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 0 7px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.34 0 0); border-radius: 4px; background: oklch(0.265 0 0); color: oklch(0.58 0 0); font: 500 10px/1 Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-field input { width: 52px; border: 0; outline: 0; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.84 0 0); font: 500 11px/1 ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-field small { color: oklch(0.58 0 0); font-size: 10px; } .ds-field:focus-within { border-color: oklch(0.74 0.15 55); outline: 1px solid oklch(0.74 0.15 55 / .3); }

components.name: Application Menu
components.css: .ds-menu { width: 210px; padding: 4px 0; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(0.3 0 0); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(0.235 0 0); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,.45); } .ds-menu button { display: flex; width: 100%; min-height: 28px; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 24px; padding: 0 12px; border: 0; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.84 0 0); font: 400 12px/1 Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; text-align: left; } .ds-menu button:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.06); } .ds-menu button:focus-visible { outline: 0; background: oklch(0.74 0.15 55 / .15); } .ds-menu kbd { color: oklch(0.58 0 0); font: 400 10px/1 Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Desktop Confirmation Dialog
components.description: Compact native-like decision surface with safe destructive defaults.
components.html:
Delete Layer

Delete layer “Background”? This action can be undone.
components.css: .ds-dialog { box-sizing: border-box; width: 390px; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid oklch(0.3 0 0); border-radius: 6px; background: oklch(0.235 0 0); color: oklch(0.84 0 0); box-shadow: 0 18px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.55); font-family: Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dialog header { padding: 14px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.3 0 0); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; } .ds-dialog p { margin: 0; padding: 16px 20px; color: oklch(0.58 0 0); font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-dialog footer { display: flex; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 16px; border-top: 1px solid oklch(0.3 0 0); background: oklch(0.265 0 0 / .35); } .ds-dialog button { height: 28px; padding: 0 12px; border-radius: 4px; font: 500 11px/1 Inter, 'Segoe UI', system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dialog .secondary { border: 1px solid oklch(0.34 0 0); background: oklch(0.265 0 0); color: oklch(0.84 0 0); } .ds-dialog .primary { border: 1px solid oklch(0.74 0.15 55); background: oklch(0.74 0.15 55); color: oklch(0.19 0 0); } .ds-dialog button:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.74 0.15 55); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Tool Rail Button
components.description: Dense tool selector with a restrained active state.
components.html: <button class="ds-tool active" aria-label="Move tool"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M5 9V5h4M15 5h4v4M19 15v4h-4M9 19H5v-4M12 3v18M3 12h18" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.75"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-tool { display: grid; width: 36px; height: 36px; place-items: center; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 2px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.58 0 0); } .ds-tool svg { width: 17px; height: 17px; } .ds-tool:hover { background: rgba(255,255,255,.05); color: oklch(0.84 0 0); } .ds-tool.active { border-color: oklch(0.34 0 0); background: oklch(0.205 0 0); color: oklch(0.74 0.15 55); box-shadow: inset 0 1.5px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.5); } .ds-tool:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.74 0.15 55); outline-offset: 1px; }

narrative.overview: Photrez feels like a finely made instrument on a Windows desktop: compact, immediate, and mechanically predictable. Neutral surfaces recede so the canvas, pixels, guides, and active controls remain visually authoritative. Familiar desktop conventions are mandatory.
keyCharacteristics: Neutral enough for color-accurate image work.
One warm accent used for state, focus, and decisive actions.
Keyboard, pointer, and native menu paths feel equivalent.
Motion is brief, functional, and nearly invisible.

rules.name: Canvas Authority Rule
rules.body: Chrome must never compete with the image. If a control attracts attention while idle, reduce its contrast or remove decoration.

rules.name: Desktop Contract Rule
rules.body: Standard Windows behaviors are mandatory. Focus order, Escape, Enter, context menus, window controls, and destructive defaults behave as experienced desktop users expect.

rules.name: One Warm Signal Rule
rules.body: Photon Amber is the only routine accent and should occupy less than ten percent of a screen. Its rarity carries meaning.

rules.name: Zero-Tint Rule
rules.body: Persistent editor neutrals remain chroma-zero. Never introduce hue tint into chrome surrounding color-critical artwork.

rules.name: Structural First Rule
rules.body: Try a tonal step or one-pixel divider before adding a shadow.

dos: Do preserve zero-chroma graphite around the canvas so the editor does not bias color judgment.
Do use Photon Amber only for active, focused, selected, progressing, or decisive states.
Do keep common controls between 24 and 30px high and maintain a minimum 24 by 24px desktop pointer target.
Do make standard keyboard behavior complete: visible focus, Enter, Escape, arrows, Tab order, and focus restoration.
donts: Don't use AI Slop: generic glassmorphism, overused blurs, deep floating SaaS shadows, gradient text, or decorative glow.
Don't imitate bloated all-in-one design suites with stacked toolbars, redundant controls, or excessive chrome.
Don't introduce web-centric UI patterns that feel out of place in a native desktop app.
Don't animate layout, bounce controls, scale buttons on click, or choreograph application load.
Don't redesign standard Windows controls or behaviors merely for visual novelty.
